title: 01.11.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 11, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code
Enforcement Service Requests
This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic
Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for January 2, 2026
through January 8, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.tldr: This memo from the City Manager's Office transmits weekly reports to the Mayor and City Council covering January 2–8, 2026. The reports include public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office, media requests handled by Strategic Communications, and code enforcement service requests. The attached logs detail individual requests by reference number, date, requester, and category across police, fire, and general public records.
fields.key_stats: The public records log (partial, pages 1–3 of 13) shows over 55 requests logged on January 2–4, 2026 alone, spanning police reports, fire incident reports, fire prevention records, background requests, 911 dispatch logs, building permits/plans, traffic accident records, body worn camera video, FBI NICS checks, employment/payroll data, and environmental site assessments.
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached reports: (A) Public records requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) Weekly media requests from Strategic Communications, (C) Weekly code enforcement service requests from Code Enforcement.

projects: Weekly Reports: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Service Requests
